step_rationale: LDL-cholesterol regulation; ApoB lipoprotein metabolism; atherosclerosis initiation.
mechanism: Hepatic lipid-sorter regulating LDL metabolism and ApoB lipoprotein retention, driving atherothrombotic MI risk.
